old: In most alveolar rhabdomyosarcoma tumors, chromosomal translocations t(2;13) or t(1;13) produce the PAX3-FOXO1 fusion oncoprotein.
None of the ACP tumors expressed Myod1 or Myog diagnostic for rhabdomyosarcoma.
new: None of the three Pax3-Foxo1-positive ACP tumors expressed the myogenic regulatory transcription factors Myod1 or Myog that are diagnostic for rhabdomyosarcoma.
PAX3-FOXO1 is one of the fusion oncoproteins that define fusion-positive RMS.

old: PAX3-FOXO1 more accurately categorizes RMS patients versus fusion-negative disease.
new: Classifying tumors based on fusion status (fusion-positive, which includes PAX3-FOXO1, versus fusion-negative) more accurately categorizes RMS patients.
